name: Cheerio Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, bring sugar and honey to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter until blended.
3. Pour the mixture over Cheerios and mix until well coated.
4. Spread the mixture into a buttered 9 x 13 pan.
5. Let cool completely.
6. Cut into squares.
My kids loved these when they were growing up. They used to like me to add chocolate chips, of course...
